results.title: Democrats Are Now Openly Talking About Packing The Supreme Court After President Trump’s Latest Wins
results.description: For years, Democrats have told America they are the ones defending democracy, norms, and institutions. Then the Supreme Court hands President Trump a few major wins, and suddenly they want to change the size of the Court. Rep. Pramila Jayapal went on Newsmax and said Democrats are “absolutely” talking about expanding the Supreme Court. That is the tell. The timing is impossible to miss. The Court just handed President Trump key immigration victories, and the response from the left is already shifting from legal argument to institutional redesign. When you cannot win the ruling, change the scoreboard. Breitbart reported the...

results.title: Gawai celebration reflects Sarawak’s unity, says Adam Yii
results.description: MIRI (June 28): The Gawai celebration observed by the Dayak community is not merely a festive occasion but a symbol of unity that forms Sarawak’s greatest strength, said Pujut assemblyman Adam Yii Siew Sang. He said Gawai Dayak also symbolises family values, the spirit of mutual cooperation, respect for one another and life as a [...] The post Gawai celebration reflects Sarawak’s unity, says Adam Yii appeared first on Borneo Post Online .
